title: briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Nancy Guthrie live updates: Gloves among 'several items of evidence' recovered
items.description: The search is intensifying for 84-year-old Nancy Guthrie, the mother of "Today" show host Savannah Guthrie.

items.title: WATCH:  NHL stars return to Olympic hockey for 1st time in 12 years
items.description: The U.S. men's hockey team begins its quest for Olympic gold on Thursday as NHL stars return to the winter games for the first time since 2014.

items.title: A timeline of Nancy Guthrie's disappearance as search stretches on
items.description: Savannah's Guthrie's mom, Nancy Guthrie, was reported missing Feb. 1, and authorities have still not identified a possible suspect.

items.title: Mexico could be at risk of losing its measles elimination status
items.description: Mexico could be at risk of losing its measles elimination status as the virus continues to spread across the country.

items.title: Marine declared dead after falling overboard in Caribbean
items.description: Lance Cpl. Chukwuemeka E. Oforah died at the age of 21 after falling overboard from the USS Iwo Jima, the Marine Corps said.

items.title: 1/15: The Takeout with Major Garrett
items.description: Venezuelan opposition leader meets with President Trump at White House; Poll suggests Talarico leading Crockett in Texas Senate primary

items.title: WATCH:  Dogs take on the Winter Games
items.description: As the real Winter Games take place thousands of miles away in Italy, two dogs brought it home in the U.S., delivering gold-medal-worthy performances.

items.title: Judge says Pentagon 'trampled on' Sen. Kelly's First Amendment rights
items.description: A federal judge has blocked the Department of Defense from attempting to demote and reduce retirement benefits for Sen. Mark Kelly.

items.title: Senate fails to advance DHS funding, teeing up partial shutdown
items.description: The Senate failed to advance a measure to fund the Department of Homeland Security on Thursday, paving the way for another partial government shutdown...

items.title: Poll analysis on words voters pick to describe Republican, Democratic parties
items.description: Most voters call the Democratic Party weak, while most describe the GOP as extreme.

items.title: Pentagon let CBP use anti-drone laser before FAA closed El Paso airspace, AP sources say
items.description: The agency says it will ground all flights to and from the airport for “special security reasons.”

items.title: FBI combs desert terrain for clues in Nancy Guthrie’s disappearance
Few leads in Guthrie investigation after 11 days, yet cases often break unexpectedly
